stories.title: Copy of East playoff takeaways: 76ers outlast Celtics in G...
stories.summary: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the Eastern Conference's first round.

stories.title: 76ers, Embiid vanquish Celtics in Game 7 thriller
stories.summary: The 76ers became just the 14th team in NBA history to come back from a 3-1 deficit after holding on in a thrilling Game 7 win over the Celtics.

stories.title: Embiid to Philly: Don't sell tickets to Knicks fan...
stories.summary: Joel Embiid pleaded with 76ers fans to not sell their tickets to Knicks fans ahead of the rivals' playoff series.

stories.title: Golden Tempo rallies from last, wins Derby at 23-1...
stories.summary: Golden Tempo charged from the back of the pack to edge Renegade at the wire, making Cherie DeVaux the first woman trainer to win the Kentucky Derby.

stories.title: Benavidez trounces 'Zurdo' in one-sided TKO win
stories.summary: In a brilliant performance, David Benavidez became a three-division champion with a sixth-round TKO win over Gilberto "Zurdo" Ramirez on Saturday night then called out the likes of Canelo Alvarez and Dmitry Bivol.
